title: Backend skeleton: /api/chat streaming endpoint
userStory: As a brainbot user, I want a streaming chat endpoint so that the PWA can talk to Claude with tools over the brain.
acceptanceCriteria: New file pwa/src/routes/api/chat/+server.ts accepts POST { messages: AnthropicMessage[] }
System prompt held in pwa/src/lib/server/system-prompt.ts (generic writing/thinking-partner persona; brain integration instructions)
Endpoint calls anthropic.messages.stream with the latest Claude Sonnet model and the registered tools, streaming via SSE
Verify: curl -X POST localhost:5173/api/chat -d '{"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"hi"}]}' streams a response
